positioning: LitRoute is the world's most low-stakes social network for lighter-passers, note-leavers, and anyone who believes a small object can carry something worth saying. Unlike social media that performs connection or journaling apps that keep it locked away, LitRoute passes the story forward, one hand at a time.
brand_promise: Every lighter has a story. We help you find yours.
founded_context: A solo personal project by Jonas (funemployed). Open source, donation-supported, intentionally anti-commercial. Built for fun — and it kind of is.

core_values.name: Playfulness
core_values.description: Silliness is the whole point. Being weird about a lighter is correct behavior here.

core_values.name: Radical Transparency
core_values.description: No accounts, no tracking, open source. We prove it so you can check for yourself.

core_values.name: Human Warmth
core_values.description: A stranger's note at the right moment can genuinely change your day.

core_values.name: Low Stakes, High Meaning
core_values.description: This doesn't have to matter. That's exactly why it does.

audience.description: Someone who found LitRoute because a stranger handed them a lighter and said 'check this out.' They don't take themselves too seriously but quietly love small moments of serendipity.
audience.goals: Participate in something small and human without any fuss or sign-up friction.
audience.pain_points: Every app wants their data, their email, their time. This one doesn't — and that's the whole appeal.

primary.name: Amber Gold
primary.usage: Primary brand color. Headlines, labels, key accents, links on dark backgrounds.

primary.name: Char
primary.usage: Primary text and dark backgrounds. Warm dark — not pure black.

primary.name: Ember Red
primary.usage: Accent for emphasis, errors, and moments that need heat. Use sparingly.

secondary.name: Smoke Blue
secondary.usage: Cool counterpoint. Subtle UI elements, secondary labels, metadata.

secondary.name: Parchment
secondary.usage: Primary background. Softer than white — gives everything a lived-in warmth.

headline.name: Fraunces
headline.rationale: A variable optical-size serif with genuine character. Quirky without being novelty, warm without being precious. Right for a brand that is intimate but not corporate.

body.name: DM Sans
body.rationale: Clean, geometric, friendly without trying too hard. Provides clear utilitarian contrast to Fraunces, ensuring UI copy is always readable first.

logo_direction: Icon + wordmark combination mark. Icon: a map location pin teardrop shape with a simple flame form at its center — reads immediately as both 'you are here' and 'something is burning here.' Simple enough for 16px favicon and embossed on a lighter. Wordmark: 'LitRoute' in Fraunces Bold, default or slightly tight tracking. Consider color split: 'Lit' in Amber Gold (#E8A030), 'Route' in Char (#1C1A15). Avoid gradients, glow effects, literal lighter illustrations, or anything that reads as crypto or extreme sports.

traits.we_are: Clear and direct. Every word earns its place in UI copy.
traits.we_are_not: Terse or robotic. Clarity does not mean cold.

traits.we_are: Genuinely caring. We want your note to reach the right person.
traits.we_are_not: Saccharine or performative. No 'we are a family' energy.

traits.we_are: Weird in the best way. Comfortable with the silliness of this whole thing.
traits.we_are_not: Trying to be funny. The humor comes from being earnest.

traits.we_are: Transparent about what this is. One person made this for fun.
traits.we_are_not: Overselling. We don't call it a platform unless it earns the word.

writing_principles: In UI copy, one word beats three. In storytelling, take your time.
The lighter is the hero. Not the app.
Never sound like a startup. You are one person who made a cool thing.
Privacy is a value, not a feature. Live it; don't brag about it.
Write notes like you are leaving them for a friend you have not met yet.

names.name: LitRoute
names.rationale: Combines 'lit' (ignited, also slang for exciting) with 'route' (journey, path). Encodes both the lighter and the travel concept in two syllables. Short, memorable, URL-friendly.

taglines.best_for: Everywhere. Short, double-meaning, timeless. Works as near-wordmark tagline.
Hero headlines, social profiles. Evocative without being precious.
About page, interviews, anywhere with room for a laugh.
The moment a new user first scans a lighter. Personal and immediately intriguing.

taglines.tagline: One lighter. Many hands. One map.
taglines.best_for: Explainer copy, landing pages. Describes the mechanic poetically.

taglines.tagline: Carried by strangers, kept by stories.
taglines.best_for: Longer-form intros, press descriptions. More literary.

taglines.tagline: Track the spark. Leave a mark.
taglines.best_for: Social captions, call-to-action copy. Satisfying rhythm.
Minimalist uses — print, favicon tooltip, loading screens.

taglines.tagline: For people who leave things behind on purpose.
taglines.best_for: About page header. Slightly absurd, completely accurate, instantly memorable.

taglines.tagline: A little flame goes a long way.
taglines.best_for: Donation appeals, thank-you pages, warmer contexts.

usage_examples.copy: Your lighter's been places. Find out where.
I'm funemployed and I had a lighter. Someone had given it to me. I wondered where it had been before that. So I made a thing. It's silly. It's also kind of wonderful? You be the judge. — Jonas
This lighter's just getting started. Check in to write the first chapter.
found a lighter at a bar in Lisbon. apparently it's been to 4 countries. left a note for whoever picks it up next. this website is very silly and I love it. litroute.com
